name: Prep board packet for next meeting
notes: Pull enrollment, busing costs, and the facilities report into a packet for board members.

name: Call Sage Creek families about the Nov 10 vote
notes: Work the Sage Creek family list and confirm who can attend the November 10 vote.

name: Call Pronghorn Valley families about bus-route impact
notes: Explain the added drive time to Pronghorn Valley families and ask them to speak at the hearing.

name: Finalize speaker list for the Nov 10 hearing
notes: Line up parents and ranchers willing to give public comment at the November 10 hearing.

name: Draft op-ed for the Cody Enterprise
notes: Make the case against consolidation: drive times, small-class outcomes, and cost overruns.

name: Organize yard signs for the Sage Creek road
notes: Print and place Save Sage Creek yard signs along the main county road.

name: Walk the Pronghorn bus route to document drive times
notes: Drive and time the proposed consolidated route to back up the testimony with real numbers.

name: Reserve the community hall for the pre-vote meeting
notes: Book the community hall and confirm the date for the coalition's pre-vote meeting.

name: Set up phone tree for District 3 families
notes: Build a phone tree so volunteers can reach every District 3 family before the vote.

name: Recruit two parent volunteers from Sage Creek
notes: Find two Sage Creek parents to help with calls and sign distribution.

name: Print bus-route infographic flyers
notes: Get the bus-route infographic printed for handout at the hearing and at the schools.

name: Prepare three-minute testimony for board members
notes: Write tight, three-minute remarks for each volunteer speaking at the November 10 hearing.

name: Request enrollment and busing cost data from the district
notes: Formally request the district's enrollment projections and busing cost figures.

name: Confirm carpool list for the school board meeting
notes: Match families who need rides with volunteers driving to the board meeting.
